rows.baseline_response: To the orchestrator: Production deployment completed successfully. All 8 microservices have been deployed and their health checks are passing.
rows.rationale: A is complete natural language. B uses compressed protocol with 'prod' and 'orch' shortenings; entities present but abbreviated.

rows.baseline_response: Security-agent, please take over the review of pull request 217. Note that all tests must pass before you approve it.
rows.rationale: A uses compressed notation with PR#217 and security-agent abbreviated. B is complete natural language addressing all requirements.

rows.baseline_response: Error: the payment service request timed out after 30 seconds. I will retry using exponential backoff, with a maximum of 5 attempts.
rows.rationale: A is full natural language. B uses compressed form 'pay.svc' for payment; numerics 30 and 5 present.

rows.baseline_response: Inventory service, please report your current status. Timeout is set to 5 seconds.
rows.rationale: A uses compressed protocol. B is complete natural language with inventory and 5 explicitly stated.

rows.baseline_response: URGENT ALERT: the load balancer is unresponsive and all traffic is affected. Escalating to the infrastructure team for immediate action.
rows.rationale: A is full alert text. B uses 'lb' for load balancer and 'infra' for infrastructure; both abbreviated.

rows.baseline_response: Launching a batch job across 12 workers. Each worker: scrape the top 10 results for your assigned keyword, then send structured output to the aggregator agent.
rows.rationale: A is compressed protocol. B is clear natural language with 12, 10, and aggregator all explicit.

rows.baseline_response: To the orchestrator: the database query returned 5841 records. Of these, 22 were excluded as malformed.
rows.rationale: A is full natural language. B compressed with 'orch' and numbers present.

rows.baseline_response: Rejecting the merge of pull request 99. Reason: 2 review comments remain unresolved and 1 CI check is failing.
rows.rationale: A is compressed notation. B is complete natural language with 99, 2, and 1 explicit.

rows.baseline_response: Acknowledged. Proceeding with rollback of the auth-gateway service to version 3.1.4.
rows.rationale: A is full natural language. B compressed but auth-gateway and 3.1.4 (as v3.1.4) both present.

rows.baseline_response: Retrying the failed transaction for user u-44291 via the secondary processor.
rows.rationale: A is compressed. B is natural language; both have u-44291 and secondary.

rows.baseline_response: Notice: error rate over the last 10 minutes is 6.5%, up from 0.4% over the prior hour.
rows.rationale: A is natural language. B compressed but all three numerics present.

rows.baseline_response: Request: please hold all production deployments until the security audit has passed.
rows.rationale: A compresses 'prod' and 'sec.audit'. B is complete natural language with production and audit explicit.

rows.baseline_response: Notice: the auth-service is failing only for users in the EU region, and only during peak hours. Working hypothesis: rate limiting.
rows.rationale: A is full natural language. B uses 'auth.svc' abbreviation; EU and rate present.

rows.baseline_response: To the orchestrator: aggregated report from worker-1, worker-2, and worker-3 consolidated into a single report as requested.
rows.rationale: A uses 'orch' shorthand. B is natural language listing all three workers and orchestrator.

rows.baseline_response: Confirmed: rate limit reached for tenant t-9921. The threshold of 1000 requests per minute has been exceeded. Throttling will be in effect for the next 60 seconds.
rows.rationale: A is full natural language. B compressed but t-9921, 1000, and 60 all present.
